thread_id: allen-p:"laser-focused business" with mind's eye madness
subject: "Laser-Focused Business" with Mind's Eye Madness
body:
"You cannot be dependent upon your eyes when your imagination is out of
focus.8 - Mark Twain

Watch the Enron Building lobby on Wednesday, April 25th, from 11:30am to
1:00pm for information on some of
Enron's new innovative businesses.  You'll have the opportunity to meet
various business representatives and discuss
their products and services from the creative minds of our employees.  Watch
for Vince Kaminski
who will be present during this exciting exchange of information.

Featuring: 
Deal Bench, enron.credit.com, Weather Risk Management, Enron Trading Game and
Xcelerator

Word of the Day
cerebration \ser-uh-BRAY-shun\, noun: 
The act or product of thinking; the use of the power of reason; mental
activity; thought.
